title: Agent Observation Event
description: Language-neutral envelope for agent COGNITIVE observability — what an agent knew, was authorized to do, predicted, intended, and concluded. The cognitive sibling of an OpenTelemetry span; AOP standardizes the fields the OTel GenAI SIG defers to the application layer. Derived from Sonder's SonderEventCore (packages/core/src/types/event.ts); chain/signature fields are Sonder-implementation concerns and are intentionally NOT part of this spec.

aop_version.description: Spec version of this envelope. Non-negotiable for a standard; lets consumers branch on schema evolution independently of any implementation's internal version.

id.description: Globally unique event id. ULID recommended (lexically sortable).

parent_id.description: Predecessor event id — forms the causal chain.

trace_context.description: OpenTelemetry interop. Links this cognitive event to the execution-layer span that ran. Makes AOP complementary to OTel, not a competitor.

resources.description: Resources/paths this action touched (files, tables, URLs). Source for rollback/overlap detection.

paths.description: Filesystem paths touched. Narrower alias of resources for the file-write case.

payload.description: Opaque action payload. Not interpreted by the spec.

metadata.description: Free-form. Implementations attach impl-specific blocks here (e.g. redaction evidence, chain/signature).

capabilities.description: CAN DO — what capabilities were mounted, at what resolution, within what budget.

memory.description: KNOWS — what memory was consulted, and with what confidence.

reasoning.description: THINKS — what deliberation concluded, and whether there was dissent.

governance.description: DID — was the handoff valid against the state contract, and what policy evidence supports that.

tier.description: '+'-joined list of policy tiers that produced evidence, e.g. 'L0+L1'. Absent for non-policy emitters.

evidence.description: Per-rule policy evidence. Required when tier references L1/L2/L3 (sign-refusal); optional otherwise.

approval_gate.description: Pre-emit human/supervisor approval gate. When state is 'pending', a conformant producer SHOULD abort before persistence and resolve out-of-band.

prediction.description: THINKS WILL HAPPEN — predicted outcome with Bayesian (Beta) confidence.

intent.description: WILL DO — the planned action and its StepTrace.

outcome.description: Structured post-execution outcome, written back after a gated action runs. Absent on pre-execution decision events.
